title: Differentiate Interactive Buttons from Info Containers
summary: Buttons and static info containers share similar styling. Add distinct interactive affordances to buttons.

tasks.description: Add cursor:pointer, subtle hover lift, and distinct border treatment to interactive buttons vs static containers like gate-indicator, result-display(idle), and star-display.
acceptance_criteria: Interactive buttons have cursor:pointer and hover effects (lift + glow)
Static info containers have no hover effects and default cursor
Visual distinction is clear between clickable and non-clickable elements

testing_focus: Hover over buttons vs info containers and verify visual distinction
